# Hacker submission (Champion)

Use this template if you are submitting a **Hacker** entry for the current season.

## Required info

- Name / Handle to display: 
- Project name:
- Short description (1–2 sentences):

## Required links

Provide public links (stable URLs):

- Repo (optional):
- Write-up / blog post:
- Demo (live or recorded):

## Checklist

- [ ] I added my row under **2026 (Season 1) — Hackers** in `README.md`.
- [ ] If this is the first real entry in the table, I removed the `_No entries yet_` row.
- [ ] My `Links` cell includes **write-up** and **demo** (repo link optional).
- [ ] All links are publicly accessible.
- [ ] My PR only changes what’s necessary for my submission.

## Row (paste the exact row you added)

```md
| @handle | Project Name | Short description | [repo](...) · [write-up](...) · [demo](...) | ![Hacker 2026](badges/2026/openhands-hacker-2026.svg) |
```
